Description: A Host Filesystem Volume Driver for Docker

Env.Name: LOG_LEVEL
Env.Description: Log level for the driver (defaults to 'info')

Env.Name: HOST_DIR
Env.Description: Host filesystem mount inside the driver filesystem (defaults to '/var/lib/host-fs/host')

Env.Name: MOUNT_DIR
Env.Description: Docker propagation filesystem mount inside the driver filesystem (defaults to '/var/lib/host-fs/mount')

Env.Name: STATE_DIR
Env.Description: State filesystem mount inside the driver filesystem (defaults to '/var/lib/host-fs')
